idea: ClosetMate - Tinder-style outfit discovery app. Users swipe outfits to train AI taste profile, then AI suggests outfits from their own wardrobe. Tinder swipe mechanic for fashion discovery + personal wardrobe styling.

parameters.title: ClosetMate
parameters.target_audience: Fashion-conscious individuals looking to optimize their wardrobe choices
parameters.key_differentiator: Combines Tinder-style swiping with personal wardrobe integration for unique outfit suggestions.

idea: ClosetMate — Tinder-style outfit swipe app + AI wardrobe stylist
key_differentiator: Tinder swipe trains AI taste profile — zero manual wardrobe input needed
pricing: Free (swipe feed) + $4.99/mo Pro (outfit generation from own closet)
tiktok_hook: I let AI dress me for 7 days using only swipes
brand_play: Natural extension of PantryMate — same decision fatigue mechanic, fashion vertical

idea: Background Note Taker — passive app that listens in background during meetings/conversations and auto-generates structured notes without user needing to do anything
key_differentiator: Completely passive — no tap to record, no setup, just runs. Notes appear after meeting ends.
competitors: Otter.ai, Fireflies, Notion AI — all require intentional recording
tiktok_hook: I forgot to take notes in 3 meetings this week. This app did it for me.

idea: Moment Capture — captures life moments you forgot to record. Uses phone motion/location signals to detect when something interesting happened and prompts 'Did you want to capture that?' 5 minutes after
key_differentiator: Retrospective capture — instead of remembering to record, it reminds you after the moment
note: Privacy-sensitive — needs very clear messaging. Could be a viral hit if positioned right.

idea: Business Idea Suggestion App/Website — based on real need. User inputs their skills, time available, capital — gets ranked business ideas with build instructions, revenue projections, and first steps
key_differentiator: Based on REAL need signals (Reddit, trending searches, market data) not generic ideas
note: This is essentially a productized version of our truth engine. High demand, proven by courses selling the same thing.

idea: Support Hub — unified support website with chat, email, and phone number across all Wolfgang products. One Zoho-powered support portal for PantryMate, SmartBook AI, UnitFix, Wolfpack AI
verdict: BUILD — low effort, high trust signal
note: support.pantrymate.net or help.wolfpackai.io — one Crisp/Tidio chat widget across all products

idea: Bathroom Finder — finds clean bathrooms in cities, rural areas, airports, road trips. Real-time cleanliness ratings, airport terminal-specific, road trip mode showing next bathroom within X miles.
key_differentiator: Rural + road trip mode + airport terminal maps + real-time cleanliness scores
competitors: Flush (decent), SitOrSquat (Charmin), Toilet Finder — all weak on rural/airports
data_source: OpenStreetMap has restroom data (free), Google Places API for businesses
pricing: Free + $1.99/mo Pro OR ad-supported with business sponsorships
tiktok_hook: POV: you're 40 miles from the nearest town and need a bathroom right now

idea: NeedFinder — multi-module 'find it right now' app. Modules: Bathrooms, Baby Changing Stations, Quiet Spaces, Nursing/Pumping Rooms, Dog-Friendly spots, Van Life overnight parking. One app, multiple desperate use cases.
verdict: BUILD NOW — stronger than single-purpose bathroom finder
key_differentiator: Multi-module platform. Each module attracts different community. Cross-pollinates users. 5x the retention of single-purpose app.
data_source: OpenStreetMap (free), Google Places API, community contributions
tiktok_hooks: POV: baby needs changing in the airport and you can't find a table
Found the only quiet room in JFK using this app
Traveled 2 years in a van — this is how I find safe overnight spots
launch_order: Start with bathrooms (broadest appeal) → add changing stations (viral parent content) → quiet spaces (remote work angle)

idea: Wolfpack Mobile — AI business partner mobile app. Fork OpenClaw (open source), rebrand as Wolfpack AI, add Stripe dashboard, agent controls, MRR alerts, quick commands. Sell to other entrepreneurs at $19-29/mo.
verdict: FLAGSHIP — build after first revenue milestone ($1k MRR)
key_differentiator: Built by a founder who actually uses it. Not a demo product. Real pipelines, real agents, real money.
build_approach: Fork OpenClaw (open source MIT license), add mobile wrapper via Capacitor or React Native, rebrand as Wolfpack AI
pricing: $19/mo Starter / $49/mo Pro (more agents, more pipelines) / $99/mo Agency
note: This IS the pipeline factory productized. The system we built for Wolfgang becomes the product.

idea: Veldt AI — Personal AI assistant mobile app that actually DOES things. Memory of who you are, connects to Gmail/Calendar/real services, proactive (reaches out to you), executes tasks not just answers questions. The AI companion everyone wants but nobody has built properly.
verdict: LONG-TERM FLAGSHIP — build after $5k MRR milestone
key_differentiator: Agents, not answers. Memory, not just chat history. Proactive, not just reactive.
competitors: ChatGPT app (no actions), Claude app (no actions), Siri (weak), Google Assistant (declining) — NONE do true agentic mobile
brand: Veldt — 'Your AI. Actually yours.' — personal brand, not Wolfpack (which is business-focused)
build_order: 1. Wolfpack Mobile (business, simpler) → 2. Veldt AI (personal, flagship) → 3. Combine into one platform
market_size: Every smartphone user who's frustrated that AI apps just chat but don't do anything
note: This is essentially OpenClaw for consumers. Wolfgang has the blueprint — he uses it daily. The product IS his life.
flagship_feature: On-device AI — runs a small local model (Gemma 2B or Llama 3.2 3B) directly on the phone. Works offline, fully private, no data leaves device. Smart routing: simple tasks → on-device, complex → cloud.
tech_for_flagship: Google MediaPipe LLM Inference API (free), Gemma 2B (1.5GB download on setup), Capacitor native plugin for ML inference
differentiator_updated: ONLY AI assistant with true on-device + cloud hybrid. Works in airplane mode. Zero API costs for on-device queries. Privacy as core feature.
tagline_updated: Your AI. On your device. Anywhere.

idea: Lead Finder SaaS — sell our niche lead databases as subscriptions. Caribbean tourism leads, US dental leads, UK aesthetics leads, RE wholesale leads, custom niches on request. Similar to Apollo.io but hyper-niche.
verdict: BUILD NOW — product already exists, just needs packaging and a sales page
target_buyers: Marketing agencies, sales teams, real estate investors, SmartBook AI competitors, local SEO resellers
competitive_advantage: Hyper-niche pre-qualified leads vs generic Apollo.io/ZoomInfo data
